label: 第154話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 伏黒とパンダは秤の居場所へ近づこうとするが、星綺羅羅に侵入を察知される。虎杖は秤の信用を得るため、八百長の試合へ出場する。
summary_full: 虎杖はパンダとの試合を終え、次の試合で台本を無視して相手を倒したことで秤がいるモニタールームへ通される。伏黒はパンダと合流し、屋上から部屋へ近づこうとするが、秤と行動する星綺羅羅の術式によって特定の対象へ近づけなくなる。綺羅羅は二人を高専の差し金だと判断し、秤へ異常を知らせる。伏黒は玉犬と蝦蟇を使いながら、呪力が付いた対象同士の接近を制御する術式の規則を探り始める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 teams up with パンダ to infiltrate the fight club from the outside. They put together a plan to ensure that 悠仁 's meeting with 秤 goes uninterrupted, but it's difficult to factor in the other third-year, 星綺羅羅 , who could thwart their plot at any moment.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 悠仁 keeps putting on a show while 恵 and パンダ form a plan to infiltrate the fight club. パンダ leaves the parking garage and meets 恵 in the nearby forest. He asks 恵 if he thinks 悠仁 will be able to make contact with 秤. 恵 thinks so, but he asks why パンダ hasn't met 秤 himself. パンダ knows 秤 is in the monitoring room on the roof, but he can't get close to the door because of 星綺羅羅's 術式 . Regardless of if he walks or runs as he approaches the door, パンダ can't reduce the distance. He compares the feeling to the stopping effect of 五条悟 's 無限 . 恵 asks if its only active when 綺羅羅 is in the monitoring room but パンダ is unsure since 綺羅羅 is always with 秤. 恵 subdues the guards while literally hiding in their shadows. Rather than forcing the issue, パンダ attracted spectators to avoid getting on 秤's bad side. パンダ is grateful the first-years showed up but 恵 is still uneasy about 悠仁 being able to convince 秤. パンダ thinks 悠仁's charm will work on 秤, but is also apprehensive because 悠仁 is a bad liar. パンダ gave him some tips beforehand to be ready for any situation. Worst case scenario would be for 秤 to discover 悠仁 is with 呪術高専 and boot him out. パンダ wants to secure the area and monitor the door to prevent this, meaning they'll need to take out some security guards. He knows where the cameras are and their blind spots, as well as the positions of all the lookouts. 恵 acknowledges they might just have a solid plan, but 綺羅羅's technique remains an x-factor. If 秤 and 綺羅羅 get 悠仁 outside the door or bring in more muscle somehow, 恵 says they'll just have to give up on their objective altogether. パンダ takes out the other lookouts to secure a path to the roof. After winning another match in the fight club tournament, 悠仁 sends 恵 a text at 12:58 P.M. saying he's meeting with 秤 at 1:00 o'clock. 恵 immediately deletes the message from his phone. While each of the five lookouts maintain their positions, 綺羅羅 brings 悠仁 to meet with 秤. 綺羅羅 nicknames him Yu and calls him young, sharing that 秤 had to repeat a year in junior high. 悠仁 notes how cheerful 綺羅羅 is and they reply it because 秤 is feeling hot again. 恵 sneaks into the first guard's shadow and mounts him from behind, sinking in a rear-naked choke. He chokes the man unconscious, tapes his mouth and zip ties his hands together. The second guard walks by without noticing and 恵 quickly slides into his shadow as well, eventually knocking him out with a triangle choke. 恵 manages to take them both out while remaining in the camera's blind spot. At the same time, two guards notice パンダ playing with a tire and think nothing of it. One of them wonders if he eats fish sausage while the other recognizes パンダ from the tournament. パンダ knocks them both out and takes the fish sausage before heading up the emergency stairs where there are no cameras. 綺羅羅 catches 恵 and パンダ sneaking in. パンダ regroups with 恵 on the roof and assures him any trouble caused by this won't be a big deal later on. They move to guard the monitor room door but 綺羅羅 suddenly walks out to the lower level of the room just a few feet below them. 恵 and パンダ are both surprised 綺羅羅 isn't with 秤. 綺羅羅 quickly notices the pair recognizes 恵 from the camera feed. They make the connection that 恵 and Yu are both from 呪術高専 like パンダ. 綺羅羅 believes 秤 is in danger and reaches for her phone to call him. 恵 acts quickly and summons 玉犬: 渾 to try and stop them. " Would you believe me if I said you could work one hour a day and make one million yen in a month? " 玉犬 moves to restrain 綺羅羅 but it's sent flying back into 恵. 綺羅羅 drops their phone while 恵 realizes that their 術式 stopped 玉犬 from getting close. 綺羅羅 runs toward the monitor room and パンダ tries to explain they're not enemies. 綺羅羅 doesn't believe パンダ simply has a request for 秤 and is upset with him for seemingly betraying them. パンダ can't get close to 綺羅羅 due to the technique so 恵 orders 玉犬 to intercept her path. This stops 綺羅羅 from approaching 玉犬 but 恵 is suddenly pulled to his 式神. 恵 realizes in addition to being unable to reach 綺羅羅, he won't be able to separate from 玉犬. While he wonders how this 術式 functions, neither he nor パンダ have noticed a symbol on the bear's back that reads "★Imai". Meanwhile, inside the monitor room, 秤 meets with 悠仁 for the first time. He asks if 悠仁 believes he could make one hour a day and make one million yen a month. Unsure of what to say 悠仁 just looks on confused and replies with "huh?".
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: パンダ 伏黒恵 星綺羅羅 虎杖悠仁 John☆Bobby (声のみ) 秤金次
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 恵 & パンダ vs. 星綺羅羅 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 星綺羅羅の術式 星間飛行 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾 玉犬: 渾

key_events_verified_phase8: 虎杖が試合を経て秤のモニタールームへ通される
伏黒とパンダが合流する
綺羅羅が二人の侵入を発見する
星間飛行によってモニタールームへの接近を阻まれる
伏黒が術式の規則を分析し始める
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
